# Acharya AI

> Ancient Indian palmistry (Hasta Samudrika Shastra) powered by AI. Scan your palm and receive a personalized cinematic destiny reading.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Landing — what Acharya AI does, how it works, pricing, FAQ
- [Palm Scan](/scan): Start a palm reading by choosing a hand and capturing your palm
- [Destiny Reading](/reading): Sample AI-generated reading and pricing unlock
